title: Community Owned Dex on HL: Kittenswap
summary_title: KittenSwap's 30% airdrop strategy flips HyperEVM's top DEX in three months
summary_description: From self-funded to #1 TVL: how two DeFi OGs built the DEX ecosystem wanted using concentrated liquidity and community-first tokenomics.

key_moments.label: Shinji introduces KittenSwap co-founders and DeFi background
Why KittenSwap chose concentrated liquidity pools over UniV2 AMMs
30% airdrop and points program drove user adoption and TVL lead
MechaCats NFT launch as self-funded seed round and community builder
Why DeFi shifted from Arbitrum to HyperEVM after airdrop mess
Three-in-one yield: KUSD/USDC pool earns Kaiko, HyperFi, and Kitten points
MechaCats holders receive 3% of beacon token at TGE

pull_quote: Letting people get in early allows the community to form and allows people to really get invested in the protocol.
